title: Giant Crops
description: Reward yourself for farming with giant potatoes, carrots, and beetroot!
body:
Reward yourself for farming with giant potatoes, carrots, and beetroot! This mod adds Giant Potatoes, Poisonous Potatoes, Carrots, and Beetroots. These are both placeable and edible blocks. Happy farming!

This mod is free to be used in modpacks.
